title: The efficacy of albumin with diuretics in the mechanically ventilated patients                                          with hypoalbuminemia : systematic review and meta-analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"hlct","text":"Hypoproteinemia is significantly correlated with fluid overload, development of ARDS and mortality[1, 2]. According to a large European observational study, a positive fluid balance is one of the factors for death (OR 1.1, 95%CI 1.0-1.1, p-value 0.001)[3]. Thus, to achieve the improvement of systemic status and increase ventilator free days, reducing fluid volume is essential[4]. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":383}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2neng","text":"So far, the effect of albumin with the diuresis in hypoalbuminemia has been investigated in several randomized controlled trials (RCTs)[5-9]. Furthermore, a systematic review and meta-analysis suggested that the effect of albumin was limited only to transient improvements of urine volume[10]. However, this analysis did not investigate the mechanically ventilated critically ill patients. Although a systematic review in 2014 was conducted to investigate that colloids could improve diuresis in patients mechanically ventilated, this review did not include recent RCTs[11]. Thus, we still don't have a clear answer for the improvement of the haemodynamic stability, mortality or ventilator free days. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":702}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dnuhj","text":"Our aim is to clarify the benefit of albumin administration for the mechanically ventilated patients in combination with the diuresis in this systematic review and meta-analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":178}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"26t9f","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4e6ki","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Yuki Itagaki
